name: Tofu with Sour Curry
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Sour curry paste, see recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube the tofu and drain for 10 minutes in a colander.
2. Heat the vegetable oil in a wok over medium heat.
3. Stir-fry the onion for 2 minutes. Add the tofu, spreading it evenly in the bottom of the wok and fry until it begins to change color. Turn over and repeat. Remove the tofu.
4. Add the curry paste and stir-fry for 1 minute. Put the tofu back in the wok and add the okra and tomatoes.
5. Stir-fry, taking care not to break the tofu, for 3 to 4 minutes.
6. Add the dissolved cornstarch with the lime juice, salt, and soy sauce. Let the mixture cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 to 7 minutes.
7. Garnish with the green onions and serve hot over rice.
